notes: Screenshots are public app page-content captures and do not include browser address bars.
Exact URLs and revision metadata are recorded in docs/FINAL_EVIDENCE_REPORT.md.
No secret values, private tokens, billing pages, private emails, or service-account material are included.

screenshots.description: Desktop Field Command Center homepage with prototype and synthetic-demo labels, map, metrics, and case feed.
Desktop map and case-feed viewport on the deployed Cloud Run app.
Report flow start with stepper, proof-photo upload, location, manual fallback, voice, and description fields.
Manual map-pin fallback visible after geolocation denial/unavailability.
Gemini triage draft generated from explicitly synthetic prototype evidence.
Saved synthetic demo issue detail with evidence, lifecycle fields, draft plan, and no external filing claim.
Persisted server agent run showing all 8 tool steps and human approval gate.
Same issue reopened after refresh with the persisted agent trace still present.
Demo operator workspace showing synthetic-only boundary and demo-labelled cases.
Mobile homepage layout with bottom navigation and floating report action.
Mobile report flow with manual map-pin fallback and 44px-class controls.

reusedPriorEvidence.description: Live API evidence that demo/anonymous operator mutation is denied for a non-demo case.
Closure recommendation persists without automatically resolving the case.
Public /health 200 page-content evidence from the final evidence package.
